Enum Class GraphicEffect

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<GraphicEffect>
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.effect.graphics.GraphicEffect
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<GraphicEffect>, Constable, NormalizableEffect
public enum GraphicEffect extends Enum<GraphicEffect> implements NormalizableEffect
A graphic effect.

Some graphic effects can only be applied to rasterized content (images)

    Description

  • Enum Constant Details

    • HUE_SHIFT

      public static final GraphicEffect HUE_SHIFT
      The hue-shift graphic effect.

      Note for Scratchers: This effect is similar to the "color" effect in Scratch. Unlike in Scratch, the max meaningful value of this effect is 360 and not 200.

    • BULGE

      public static final GraphicEffect BULGE
      The bulge graphic effect.

      Note for Scratchers: This effect is similar to the "fisheye" effect in Scratch.

    • WHIRL

      public static final GraphicEffect WHIRL
      The whirl graphic effect.

    • SKEW_X

      public static final GraphicEffect SKEW_X
      The skew graphic effect. Skew is performed along the X axis.

    • SKEW_Y

      public static final GraphicEffect SKEW_Y
      The skew graphic effect. Skew is performed along the Y axis.

    • PIXELATION

      public static final GraphicEffect PIXELATION
      The pixelation graphic effect.

      Note for Scratchers: This effect is similar to the "pixelate" effect in Scratch.

    • MOSAIC

      public static final GraphicEffect MOSAIC
      The mosaic graphic effect.

    • BRIGHTNESS

      public static final GraphicEffect BRIGHTNESS
      The brightness graphic effect.

    • FADE

      public static final GraphicEffect FADE
      The fade graphic effect. 0 - fully opaque, 100 - fully transparent.

      Note for Scratchers: This effect is similar to the "ghost" effect in Scratch.

  • Method Details

    • values

      public static GraphicEffect[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static GraphicEffect valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null

    • normalize

      public double normalize(double value)
      Normalizes the given value to be suitable for this effect.
      Specified by:
      normalize in interface NormalizableEffect
      Parameters:
      value - the value to normalize
      Returns:
      the normalized value

    • getDefaultValue

      public double getDefaultValue()
      Returns the default value of this effect instance.
      Specified by:
      getDefaultValue in interface NormalizableEffect
      Returns:
      the default effect value
